import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut state = 0
  mut num = 0
  mut sign = 1
  while i <= n
    mut c = 32
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        c = v
      when None
        c = 32
      end
    end
    let is_digit = c >= 48 and c <= 57
    let is_minus = c == 45
    let is_plus = c == 43
    if is_digit
      num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
      state = 2
    else if (is_minus or is_plus) and state == 0
      if is_minus
        sign = -1
      else
        sign = 1
      end
      state = 1
    else
      if state == 2
        result = list.push(result, sign * num)
      end
      state = 0
      sign = 1
      num = 0
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

fn run(_ line1: String, _ line2: String) -> Unit
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(target)
    match find_index(nums, target)
    when Some(idx)
      print("index=#{idx}")
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line2)
    run(line1, line2)
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
when None
  print("not_found")
end
